title: Smoky Fish Indian Stir-fry
description: A vegan-friendly hangover-cure dish featuring smoky flavors and spices combined with fish fillets in a light sauce.

ingredients.name: fish fillet
ingredients.notes: use any variety of firm fish like salmon, cod or tilapia

ingredients.name: ginger
ingredients.amount: 2 tbsp fresh or 1 tsp dried, grated

instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Add cumin seeds and toast until they start to turn brown.
Add ginger, onion, and green chilies. Sauté for about 2 minutes or until the onions are translucent.
Season with garam masala, coriander powder, turmeric, and tamarind paste water. Stir continuously for another minute.
Cut the fish fillets into bite-sized pieces and add them to the sauce along with coconut milk. Cook on medium-high heat for about 5 minutes or until the fish is cooked through.
Stir in toasted sesame seeds and serve hot.
